title: App Group and Keychain entitlements in project.yml
description: Add App Group (group.net.renalias.AggregatorApp) and Keychain Access Group ($(AppIdentifierPrefix)net.renalias.AggregatorApp.shared) entitlements to both AggregatorApp and AggregatorWidget targets in project.yml via the entitlements block. xcodegen will generate the .entitlements files. Both targets must carry identical group identifiers. Run xcodegen generate afterward. This is the highest-risk piece (real signing); build and verify in isolation.
acceptance_criteria: project.yml entitlements block includes com.apple.security.application-groups and keychain-access-groups for both targets
App Group and Keychain group values match exactly across both .entitlements files
Both targets build without entitlements-related signing errors in simulator
